statusLine.command: input=$(cat); pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage // empty'); resets_at=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.resets_at // empty'); if [ -n "$pct" ]; then filled=$(echo "$pct" | awk '{printf "%d", int($1/10+0.5)}'); empty=$((10-filled)); bar=$(printf '%0.sâ–ˆ' $(seq 1 $filled 2>/dev/null) 2>/dev/null; printf '%0.sâ–‘' $(seq 1 $empty 2>/dev/null) 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$resets_at" ]; then reset_label=$(TZ=America/New_York date -d "@$resets_at" +"%I:%M%p" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^0//'); else reset_label="resets: --:--"; fi; printf "\033[35m%s [%s]\033[0m" "$reset_label" "$bar"; else printf "\033[35m-- [----------]\033[0m"; fi
